transcript.text:
Hello, everyone!
So today...
(Health checkup...?) I just finished my health checkup
(She got a health checkup after many were worried about her...)
Please do not move during the scan
Compared to similar-sized women...
(Find out the shocking result on Tzuyang’s vlog channel...)
For the first time ever,
I got a colonoscopy
And now I realize...
I've been fasting for more than 36 hours
So I'm seriously starving right now
I don’t think I’ve ever fasted this long before...!
And as for the health check results...
That's a secret!
(The result is on her vlog channel) I’ll be uploading

a vlog about it, so check it out there!
Please like and subscribe there too!
(Did she really just get a colonoscopy?) I'm fine, I'm not in pain at all
I think I can start eating right away
I'll try the 10,000 calorie challenge today
(I missed you, jjajangmyeon, sweet and sour pork, and jjamppong...!) Wow, finally! I'm starving
(Walking in)
("Sokpyeonhan Jjamppong" right in front of the hospital)
(So hungry... Let's order!) I'm starving
I was recommended their meat jjamppong, so one of that,
one jjajangmyeon, one shrimp fried rice,
one pork, one shrimp, and one cheese dumpling,
one sweet and sour pork, and one chili shrimp
Let's do it
As for the dumplings...
(Shrimp dumpling, OUT) we only have fried ones

The shrimp one looked so nice!
- We took it out of the menu a few days ago - You did?
(She ordered everything except the shrimp dumpling)
How much do you think you can eat?
So, 10,000 kcal...
Usually I’d just eat without thinking...
I've never fasted this long before...
(Calculating 10,000 kcal...) Jjajangmyeon is about 800 kcal
- So it's about ten bowls...! - That's it
(She's so hungry, she has to eat something...) Picked radish
(First food in 36 hours...)
It's so good!
(Finishing the pickled radish quickly!)
Wow, eating this
just made me hungrier...!
(Really hitting her limit now...) Faster, faster...

(Sweet and sour pork)
(Chili shrimp)
(Fried dumplings)
(Fried rice)
(Jjajangmyeon)
(Jjamppong)
(Finally, the long-awaited feast arrives...!) Thank you, wow, it's big!
(4,600 kcal in total...!)
I'm literally dying right now...
(+ 900 kcal (Sweet and sour pork) + 10 kcal (Pickled radish)) Starting with the pork...
Wow, the sauce is so thick
(Feels like the longest wait ever...) Finally!
(Enjoying this happy moment with food...)
(Chinese food never disappoints...!) So satisfying
For meat jjamppong, they serve the meat separately
They told me to try that first

(Blown away)
This is so good
They could sell this on its own! The bean sprouts, wow
I never knew bean sprouts taste this good...
(+850 kcal (Meat jjamppong)) (Let's wash down the fried food with jjamppong!)
It's very spicy!
Oh, so there’s peperoncino in here
The chili aroma is really strong
It’s not like cheongyang pepper though
(Huh...?) More like capsaicin...? What is it?
What kind of heat is this?
But... this... it's so good
Let's just add everything
It's crazy
The jjamppong broth is super clean and really spicy,
and the meat adds the deep, rich flavor...

Oh, the meat...
(Drinking straight from the bowl)
This meat is so good...
Oh, the meat...
(+ 850 kcal (Jjajangmyeon))
I was seriously starving...
(Finished the jjajangmyeon in no time...)
Tastes familiar, but it never fails to hit hard
(+ 900 kcal (Chili shrimp))
This tastes like...
It is tangy...
like the sweet and sour pork
And that smoky flavor...
The smokiness...
(Love it...)
Now that I think about it, the price's amazing

Jjajangmyeon goes for 7,000 won these days,
but here, it's 4,900 won
Even for jjamppong, around 7,000 won
(The discontinued shrimp dumplings...) We took it off the menu, but you looked so sad, so...
(The owner kindly made it for her...!) I really wanted this, thank you!
(+ 500 kcal (Shrimp dumplings)) Wow, it's like fried on the bottom
See? Like this!!
It's got this layer underneath
Why did you take it off the menu...?
It's crispy, juicy, springy,
tender, and again, so juicy
It's got everything
(Five qualities in one) I'm tasting six flavors all at once
Just like xiaolongbao, the juice bursts in your mouth...
So juicy!!!
I'll let you try one, seriously...!

Whoa!
Why aren't you giving me the dumpling?
(Can't share the dumpling with anyone)
I have to count the calories today!
(Soobin's on a diet anyway) Works for me!
Wow, so juicy!
It's bursting with juice!
(+ 600 kcal (Shrimp fried rice))
The portions here are about 1.5 times bigger!
I’ve been to many Chinese restaurants,
(About 1.5x the usual amount...) and it's roughly 30 to 40% more
(Calorie-wise too, easily 1.5x...) A portion and a half
You know,
shrimp fried rice is always good
(The mid-video ad break) By the way, I had a health checkup today
If you’re curious about the results, they’re up on my vlog channel

Please go check that out
I spend a lot in food expenses, but...
(All her spending goes to food...!) I barely spend money on anything else
So yesterday was... hellish
(Story of nearly dying after fasting 36 hours) I went to "Haidilao" for hot pot,
and saw these sesame balls I'd never seen before
But I had to fast for three days, so...
So today...
this isn't the end of my meal
(I am still hungry...) I will go eat more
I’ve only hit 5,000 kcal so far
10,000 kcal...
is a whole week’s worth of food for us...
For people on a strict diet,
they stick to around 1,200 to 1,300 kcal a day
(+ 456 kcal (3 cans of Coke)) I'm so shocked, I don't know what to say...

I’m sure people think the same about you
Being shocked at each other!
You know what's crazy?
My stomach got completely emptied out,
and right now...
- I can feel the food moving down - Now?
Yeah
So it's like Tetris in there...
You're stomach’s probably so shocked...
"Why... am I still digesting...?"
"Why... won't she feed me...?"
(I'm sorry, tummy...!) It was probably wondering where's all that usual food
(I’ll take good care of you from now on...!) I usually even eat late at night
(+ 500 kcal (Fried dumplings))
(+ 160 kcal (Sprite))
(Current Total) (Pickled radish 10 kcal, sweet and sour pork 900 kcal,)

(meat jjamppong 850 kcal, jjajangmyeon 850 kcal, chili shrimp 900 kcal, shrimp dumplings 500 kcal,)
(shrimp fried rice 600 kcal, Coke 436 kcal, fried dumplings 500 kcal, and Sprite 160 kcal)
(Total: 5,726 kcal)
When I heard you were coming,
- I thought it was an April Fools’ joke...! - Really?
(It was April 1st that day) Oh right, April 1st...!
I'm so honored
I just came by chance, but the food was so good
Oh, also,
I love your shrimp dumplings...!
- Okay, we'll keep that dish - You will?
(Yay, shrimp dumplings are back) The dumplings were the best
I haven’t pulled an April Fools’ prank yet
What about you?
- I don't do that... - You just don't?
I haven’t done a prank with you in six years

But he lies every day, doesn't he?
No, I'm not easy to fool
You think you two can get me??
You two better plan it out sometime
Doesn’t have to be for April Fools’
April Fools' pranks...
I used to do them a lot back in the day
In high school, we'd always lie down for class
or just get out to the field
Do kids nowadays know that prank?
People will call you old...
"Wow, no one does that anymore..."
(Expected comment) Ancient! Fossil!
Yeah, I'm actually old now...
- I am... - You're not really old...
(Looking at his phone) Soobin, you need to get this

Looks like the car got towed...
(The car was parked out front, and it got towed...)
(Soobin's rushing out...) Really?
See...?
So easy to fool!
You're the worst...
I totally fell for it...
(Oh my gosh...)
See? We can't beat him...
Wow, you're such a great actor
You should become an actor
That was crazy, you even got me
- I was running out... - That was so good!
We were just talking about that too!
I guess...
no way we can beat him even if we teamed up

We should plan a big prank next time
(Where did everything go...?) Where's the food? I finished it all?
When did that happen?
(An easy finish!) I really enjoyed that!
(Heading straight for 10,000 kcal!!) Let's go eat more to add more calories
Let's see if I can do it...
(Current total: 5,726 kcal)
On her way to get some dessert
I'm not even full yet...!
How many calories will this be?
Cakes are pretty high in calories, right?
Yeah, usually about 500 to 600 per slice
- (Cakes are that high in calories...?) - I mean it
- Per slice? - No way! Really?
(We're here while arguing about calories!) "A Twosome Place", let's go
Should we get some tuna?

(We'll get tuna next time...)
- There's only one, grab it! - Which one?
- Ice Box...! - Where?
There's only one left
(Got the last Ice Box and other desserts) Strawberry chocolate fresh cream cake, Ice Box... there's no tiramisu?
(She's back)
All these are for me!
Wow, feels like it’s been forever since I’ve had sweets
(+ 310 kcal (Bubble tea))
I finished every boba in there!
(+ 900 kcal (Strawberry chocolate fresh cream cake))
If food disappeared from this world...
life wouldn't be worth living...
(+545 kcal (Large misu))
(Already?) Wait, I finished it...
( +720 kcal (Ice Box))

Now...
I'm craving "McDonald's"!
Sigh...
(+ 730 kcal (Kumquat fresh cream cake))
(+ 270 kcal (Strawberry latte))
(Second round, clear!) All clear
I really enjoyed that
I finished it all
So the total now is...
(Pickled radish 10 kcal, sweet and sour pork 900 kcal, meat jjamppong 850 kcal, jjajangmyeon 850 kcal,)
(chili shrimp 900 kcal, shrimp dumplings 500 kcal, shrimp fried rice 600 kcal, Coke 436 kcal,)
(fried dumplings 500 kcal, Sprite 160 kcal, and bubble tea 310 kcal)
(Calculation error) 8,886 kcal!
Oh, I see it, "McDonald's"
(It's time for round 3, "McDonald’s"!)
I picked up "McDonald’s" on the way here

(+ 342 kcal (Mango peach iced tea))
This was mango peach iced tea
in a large cup...
Well, it's gone now...!
(+ 194 kcal (68g of fries))
It's so good dipped in McFlurry
(+ 388 kcal (Oreo McFlurry))
(+ 323 kcal (Large vanilla latte))
(+ 535 kcal (Towoomba burger))
(+ 165 kcal (Two mozzarella sticks))
(Time to do some calculations...)
So now...
(Current Total)
(Pickled radish 10 kcal, sweet and sour pork 900 kcal, meat jjamppong 850 kcal, jjajangmyeon 850 kcal,)
(chili shrimp 900 kcal, shrimp dumplings 500 kcal, shrimp fried rice 600 kcal, Coke 436 kcal,)
(fried dumplings 500 kcal, Sprite 160 kcal, bubble tea 310 kcal, strawberry chocolate fresh cream cake 576 kcal,)

(Ice Box 720 kcal, large misu 545 kcal, kumquat fresh cream cake 740 kcal,)
(strawberry smoothie 270 kcal, mango peach iced tea 342 kcal, Oreo McFlurry 388kcal,)
(large fries 194 kcal, large vanilla latte 323 kcal,) In total...
(Towoomba burger 545 kcal, and mozzarella sticks 165 kcal)
(In total, 10,844 kcal...!) It's way over 10,000 kcal
Honestly, since I starved for so long,
I was worried I wouldn’t be able to eat much
But I still have room for more food
Looks like I’m totally fine!
And always, health comes first...
Everyone, make sure you don’t skip your checkups
I really recommend getting one
So glad everything came out okay
Alright, that's it for today
I'll finish the rest watching TV
Once again,
